articles.title: Teen who fatally stabbed elderly woman in Pickering receives 10-year maximum youth sentence
articles.summary: A 15-year-old boy who pleaded guilty to murdering an elderly woman in Pickering last year has received a 10-year sentence — the maximum for a youth convicted of first-degree murder.

articles.title: 2 dead following crash in Mississauga; closures affecting multiple highways
articles.summary: Two people are dead and three others are injured following a crash on Highway 401 in Mississauga on Wednesday morning, police say. In a post from Ontario Provincial Police on X, one vehicle rear-ended another in the eastbound express lanes near Dixie Road just before 9 a.m., as traffic was slowing down in the area. […]

articles.title: Hamilton man facing 136 charges in joint child‑exploitation investigation originating in Philippines
articles.summary: Toronto police unveiled the results of a major child sexual abuse and exploitation investigation Wednesday morning, announcing the arrest of a 42-year-old man from Hamilton who faces more than 100 related charges. Inspector Keri Fernandes of the Toronto Police Sex Crimes Unit detailed the case Wednesday morning at police headquarters, alongside representatives from the Royal […]

articles.title: Gun licence applications have surged in the Toronto area since 2016
articles.summary: The number of people in the Greater Toronto and Hamilton area applying for their firearms licences has increased significantly in the last decade, most notably in Peel region. It’s not clear what exactly is behind the increase, though it appears — at least in part — to be linked to growing interest in shooting sports.

articles.title: Brampton man, 31, accused of trafficking a child for sexual services
articles.summary: A Brampton man is facing a slew of charges in connection with an ongoing human trafficking investigation in the City of Vaughan. Earlier this month, detectives say they spotted a victim at a hotel in the area of Applewood Crescent and Portage Parkway who they believed to be a child in need of protection. Investigators […]

articles.title: Woman stabbed in downtown Toronto, police searching for 1 suspect
articles.summary: A woman was stabbed in downtown Toronto on Tuesday evening, according to authorities. Police say it happened near Sherbourne and Dundas Streets just after 8:30 p.m. One woman was located with a stab wound. She was transported to a hospital with non-life-threatening injuries. Police say they are looking for one suspect who is described as […]

articles.title: Teen who fatally stabbed elderly woman in Pickering in 2025 apologizes in court
articles.summary: A 15-year-old boy who fatally stabbed a retired kindergarten teacher in Pickering last year apologized in court on Tuesday.

articles.title: Motorcyclist killed in Mississauga collision, Peel police say
articles.summary: The fatal collision happened just before 10 p.m. Sunday near Argentia and Kitimat roads, police say.

articles.title: Marina Mabrey scores 30 as Tempo hold off Liberty in Montreal, ending 4-game skid
articles.summary: The Toronto Tempo held off a late-game charge from the New York Liberty on Sunday, winning 93-91 to end a four-game losing streak in their second of two games at the Bell Centre in Montreal.

articles.title: Bonnie Crombie announces intention to run for mayor of Mississauga
articles.summary: After a short stint leading the Ontario Liberals, Bonnie Crombie is looking to get her old job back as mayor of Mississauga, Ont.
